archetype: 1 - Organic & Earthy (Adapted to Professional Teal/White Healthcare)
design_philosophy: A clean, trustworthy, and functional medical interface. The design uses generous spacing, soft borders, and a crisp teal-and-white palette to reduce cognitive load during long form entries and data analysis. We prioritize emotional approachability without sacrificing data density in the admin dashboard.

components.button: rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2
components.input: w-full rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-slate-900 focus:border-[#0F766E] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0F766E]
components.table_header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 font-medium py-3 px-4 uppercase tracking-wider text-xs
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-teal-50 text-teal-700

public_registration_form.layout: Centered constrained column (max-w-3xl) with sticky progress indicator.
public_registration_form.header: Brand logo (HIMPONI), title 'Pendaftaran Anggota HIMPONI DKI Jakarta', and a subtle abstract teal texture background in the hero.
sections: Data Pribadi: Full name, DOB, Gender, Contact info.
Area Kerja: Radio buttons (Kemoterapi, Radioterapi, Lainnya).
Sertifikasi/Pelatihan: Checkboxes (Kanker Dasar, Kemoterapi, Paliatif, Radioterapi, Bedah, Napak) + Dynamic field 'Add Custom Certificate' (up to 10).
Keanggotaan Organisasi: Radio 'Anggota Himponi (Ya/Tidak)'. If 'Ya', show input for 'Nomor Anggota (NIRA)'.
public_registration_form.ux_notes: Use 'bento-style' visually separated cards for each section. Generous padding inside cards (p-8). Clear labels in Bahasa Indonesia.

admin_login.layout: Split screen or centered card. Left/Background: Modern hospital interior image. Right/Center: Login form.
admin_login.ux_notes: Clean, distraction-free. Only email/password and 'Masuk' button.

admin_dashboard.layout: Side navigation or Top navigation (Admin, Logout) + Main content area. Background #F8FAFC.
admin_dashboard.header: Summary metrics (Total Members, Top Area Kerja, New Registrations).
main_content: Filters & Actions Row: Search bar (Name/Hospital/NIRA), Dropdown filter (Area Kerja), Dropdown filter (Region), Export to Excel/CSV button.
Data Visualization: A Recharts Bar or Pie chart showing 'Distribution of members by Area Kerja' placed in a clean card layout.
Data Table: Members list with pagination. Columns: Nama, Instansi, NIRA, Area Kerja, Status.

hospital_interior.description: Empty clean hospital corridor, used for admin login background or hero backdrop.

nurse_portrait.description: Professional nurse, can be used in marketing/registration success states.

abstract_teal_texture.description: Abstract clean teal background texture, excellent for the top banner of the registration form.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='reg-form-submit', data-testid='admin-export-btn', data-testid='filter-area-kerja'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on primary Teal #0F766E meets WCAG AA standards. Hover states must be explicitly defined.
